quickAnswersDesc: Browse our FAQs below for the fastest support.
faqSubtitle: Still stuck? Send us a message and we'll help.
toastSuccessDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
toastErrorDesc: Failed to send message. Please try again.

faqs.a1: Players pay before the session's payment deadline. Each payment includes the court share plus a service fee. Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Credit-only payments skip Stripe entirely and incur no service fee.
faqs.q2: What happens if I cancel a session?
faqs.a2: If you cancel, the court amount you paid is converted into platform credits that you can use on future sessions. The service fee is non-refundable. Credits never expire and can be applied to any booking.
faqs.q3: What are credits and how do they work?
faqs.a3: Credits are your Sport Arena balance. You earn credits through cancellation refunds or referrals. When booking, you can use credits to cover the court amount — and credit-only payments have zero service fee.
faqs.a4: When a player cancels, their spot enters Rescue Mode where group members get priority to claim it. If no one picks it up, the slot may be released. This helps groups fill spots and avoid losing court time.
faqs.q5: What fees does Sport Arena charge?
faqs.a5: We charge a service fee per player that covers the platform commission and payment processing. The UI shows you the court price, service fee and total upfront — no hidden charges. Venue owners receive the full court amount.
faqs.q6: What roles are available on the platform?
faqs.a6: Sport Arena has three main roles: Players join groups and book sessions; Organisers create and manage groups and sessions; Venue Owners list their venues and courts, set availability and receive payouts. You choose your role when you sign up.
faqs.q7: How do I list my venue on Sport Arena?
faqs.a7: Sign up and select the Venue Owner role. From your dashboard you can add venues, create courts, configure weekly availability, set pricing and connect your Stripe account to receive payouts.
